items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of a scenario involving a custom field explosion with over 1000 fields. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The lack of specific traces or snapshots to audit the coverage leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this scenario.
